case_title: FIREMAN'S FUND INSURANCE COMPANY vs. BROWN, KENNETH ANSEL et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-15-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE DIRECTED TO PLT.'S ATTY. WILLIAM L. DAWKINS HEARING SET FOR SEP-24-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER AND ORDER EXTENDING TIME FOR SERVICE OF COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIREMAN'S FUND INSURANCE COMPANY
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUL-22-1997 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT X1

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIREMAN'S FUND INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, KENNETH ANSEL DOES 1 THROUGH 50 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-15-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-16-1997 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-28-1997
PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-22-1997, OFF CALENDAR PER APPLICATION & ORDER EXTENDING TIME TO SERVE TO 6-27-97 SIGNED BY COMMISSIONER FLAGEOLLET.

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-24-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON SEP-24-1997, TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AGAINST DEFT. TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFT. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY WILLIAM L. DAWKINS. PLTF'S ATTY TO FILE NEW STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-09-1997 CONTINUED FROM SEP-24-1997 TO NOV-19-1997 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
